7) Interest and Redemption
Standard Memory Digital/Performance Interest
a. Automatic Early Redemption Event If the Performance_ER is higher than or equal to ERB on the relevant Automatic Early Redemption Observation Date, an Automatic Early Redemption Event will occur.
b. Final Redemption Amount on the Redemption Date
Favourable Scenario If the Performance is higher than or equal to 65.00% on the Redemption Observation Date, a Final Redemption Amount equal to: Specified Denomination x 100.00%
Unfavourable Scenario Otherwise, a Final Redemption Amount equal to: Specified Denomination x Performance
